title: Pufferfish's Skills x Origins
description: Compatibility between Pufferfish's Skills and Origins.
body:
# Pufferfish's Skills x Origins

This mod adds compatibility between Pufferfish's Skills and Origins.

Fabric version requires [Origins (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins).
Forge version requires [Origins (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-forge).
